name: tripo-game-agent-superpowers
description: A Superpowers-style local plugin for Tripo game-asset workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Superpowers-style workflow for game-ready Tripo assets.
interface.longDescription: Tripo Game Agent Superpowers is a local, installable agent plugin for game-ready Tripo asset workflows. It uses a Superpowers-style bootstrap skill plus composable game asset skills for intake, planning, production, readiness review, fallback, packaging, and asset memory.
defaultPrompt: Run /tripo-agent ask "Unity 里用的机甲角色，quad mesh，15k 面"
Explain the Tripo Game Agent Superpowers architecture
